message:
fix: replace dangerouslySetInnerHTML with children pattern in GA Script

The production SyntaxError "Failed to execute 'appendChild' on 'Node':
Invalid or unexpected token" was caused by using dangerouslySetInnerHTML
with Next.js Script component. According to Next.js documentation, inline
scripts should use the children pattern with curly braces, not
dangerouslySetInnerHTML.

Changed from:
  <Script dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: gaConfigScript }} />

To:
  <Script>{`script content`}</Script>

This matches the working pattern used in third-party-scripts.tsx.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
